headerDisplay: Exposes a Sun Home Eclipse 2 sauna to HomeKit via a local [emberd](https://github.com/mattsmcnulty/ember) bridge. emberd must be reachable from this Homebridge host.
footerDisplay: ⚠️ This exposes a **heating appliance** to HomeKit automations. Strongly consider setting `server.heaterMaxOnMinutes` in emberd's options.json as a deadman cutoff.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: emberd server.apiKey (Bearer token for /control). Leave blank only if emberd auth is disabled.
